---
title: "MachineLearningAlpha"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
```{r}
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(reticulate)
library(matrixStats)
use_condaenv("py3.8", required = TRUE)
#use_condaenv("r4.4_env", required = TRUE)
py_config()
```




```{python}
import pickle
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import os

# Define the folder names
folders = ['imgbest', 'bestmodel']

# Create the folders if they don't exist
for folder in folders:
    if not os.path.exists(folder):
        os.makedirs(folder)
        print(f"Folder '{folder}' created.")
    else:
        print(f"Folder '{folder}' already exists.")


```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.rcParams['figure.dpi']= 1200
plt.rcParams['savefig.dpi'] = 1200
```


```{python}
# List of all model IDs
model_ids = [
  'xgboost', 'catboost', 'ada',  'dt', 'et', 'gbc', 'knn', 'lda',
    'lightgbm', 'lr', 'nb', 'qda', 'rf', 'ridge', 'svm' 
]




# List of models to train
#model_ids = ['lr', 'knn', 'nb','xgboost','catboost']


colors = ["#4E79A7", "#A0CBE8","#F28E2B", "#FFBE7D", "#59A14F", "#8CD17D","#B6992D","#F1CE63","#499894","#86BCB6",
      "#E15759","#FF9D9A","#79706E","#BAB0AC","#D37295", "#FABFD2", "#B07AA1","#D4A6C8", "#9D7660","#D7B5A6"]

```


```{python}
# Set random seed for reproducibility
np.random.seed(42)


# Load workspace variables from the file
# Load workspace variables from the file
with open("../output_pickles/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled.pkl", "rb") as file:
    combined_data = pickle.load(file)
    
# Combine both datasets into one (train + test)
#combined_data = workspace_data
rows, col =combined_data.shape

```


```{python}
from pycaret.classification import *
data = pd.DataFrame(combined_data)
data= data.rename(columns={'output': 'target'})
data.head()


```


```{python}
from pycaret.classification import pull, create_model, save_model, setup
import pandas as pd
import os

# Set up PyCaret
clf = setup(
    data=data,  # Replace with your actual dataset
    target='target',  # Replace with your actual target column
    fix_imbalance=True,feature_selection=True,n_features_to_select=50,
    fix_imbalance_method="SMOTE",
    normalize= True, 
    pca=True,n_jobs=40,
    train_size=0.8,
    session_id=123
)

X_test = get_config('X_test')
y_test = get_config('y_test')

X_train = get_config('X_train')
y_train = get_config('y_train')



```


```{python}
import os
import gc
import pandas as pd
from pycaret.classification import create_model, pull, save_model

# Ensure directory exists
os.makedirs("bestmodel", exist_ok=True)

# Excel writer setup
excel_file = os.path.abspath("model_metrics_complete.xlsx")
writer = pd.ExcelWriter(excel_file, engine='xlsxwriter')
results_df = pd.DataFrame()

# === Helper Function ===
def process_model(model_id):
    print(f"🔧 Starting model: {model_id} ...")
    model = create_model(model_id)
    result = pull()

    # Filter numeric rows
    result = result[result.index.to_series().apply(lambda x: str(x).isdigit())].copy()
    result['Model'] = model_id

    # Add Mean and Std
    mean_row = result.mean(numeric_only=True).to_frame().T
    std_row = result.std(numeric_only=True).to_frame().T
    mean_row['Model'] = 'Mean'
    std_row['Model'] = 'Std'
    result_with_summary = pd.concat([result, mean_row, std_row], ignore_index=True)

    # Save to Excel sheet
    result_with_summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=model_id, index=False)

    # Save model
    model_path = os.path.abspath(f"bestmodel/{model_id}_model.pkl")
    save_model(model, model_path)
    print(f"✅ {model_id} complete. Model saved at:\n{model_path}")
    print("------------------------------------------------------------")

    return result

# === Model Execution ===

result_ada = process_model('ada')
print("✅ ada is complete. Starting catboost...")
gc.collect()
result_catboost = process_model('catboost')
print("✅ catboost is complete. Starting dt...")
gc.collect()
result_dt = process_model('dt')
print("✅ dt is complete. Starting et...")
gc.collect()
result_et = process_model('et')
print("✅ et is complete. Starting gbc...")
gc.collect()
result_gbc = process_model('gbc')
print("✅ gbc is complete. Starting knn...")
gc.collect()
result_knn = process_model('knn')
print("✅ knn is complete. Starting lda...")
gc.collect()
result_lda = process_model('lda')
print("✅ lda is complete. Starting lightgbm...")
gc.collect()
result_lightgbm = process_model('lightgbm')
print("✅ lightgbm is complete. Starting lr...")
gc.collect()
result_lr = process_model('lr')
print("✅ lr is complete. Starting nb...")
gc.collect()
result_nb = process_model('nb')
print("✅ nb is complete. Starting qda...")
gc.collect()
result_qda = process_model('qda')
print("✅ qda is complete. Starting rf...")
gc.collect()
result_rf = process_model('rf')
print("✅ rf is complete. Starting ridge...")
gc.collect()
result_ridge = process_model('ridge')
print("✅ ridge is complete. Starting svm...")
gc.collect()
result_svm = process_model('svm')
print("✅ svm is complete. Starting xgboost...")
gc.collect()
result_xgboost = process_model('xgboost')
print("✅ xgboost is complete. All models processed!")

# === Final Summary Sheet ===
# Combine results for summary
all_results = pd.concat([
    result_ada, result_catboost, result_dt, result_et, result_gbc,
    result_knn, result_lda, result_lightgbm, result_lr, result_nb,
    result_qda, result_rf, result_ridge, result_svm, result_xgboost
], ignore_index=True)

summary = all_results.groupby('Model').mean(numeric_only=True).reset_index()
summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Model_Summary', index=False)

writer.close()

print(f"\n📊 All model metrics written to Excel at:\n{excel_file}")
print("✅✅✅ All models completed and results saved.")

```
